title: OCI Network Security Group Updated
description: Detects updates to Network Security Groups (NSGs).
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | where (Event Type = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.updatenetworksecuritygroup' or Event Type = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.addnetworksecuritygroupsecurityrules')
